steps.title: Use Text 2's method critique
steps.content: Text 2 says entrepreneurial-training studies often lack control groups and pretraining baselines. Those safeguards are needed to show whether training caused participants' high performance rather than merely coinciding with it.

steps.title: Name the objection
steps.content: Choice A concerns training length. Choice B concerns a smaller sample size, not whether training caused the result. Choice D concerns participant awareness, which Text 2 does not mention. The relevant objection is that participants may have performed well even without the training. The answer is C.
